Name: AnySearch
Tagline: Real-time structured search trusted by agents and developers
Description: A search tool for agents, not a search box. AI agents are only as good as the information they receive. When connected to AnySearch, your agent gets filtered, de-duplicated, and structured information from trusted sources searched in parallel, helping it produce more reliable results. Free to start.

Name: Typeahead 2.0
Tagline: Private AI autocomplete for every app on your Mac
Description: Typeahead 2.0 is private AI autocomplete for every app on your Mac, with writing styles per app, support for any language, and smarter context that adapts to how you work. It now feels more customizable and more useful every day, while staying lighter on memory and faster in the background. You also get private Insights to see your time saved. One-time $79 purchase, free updates, no subscription.

Name: Octolens
Tagline: Social listening for the agent era
Description: Your AI agents read your code, docs, and CRM but can't see Reddit, Hacker News, podcasts, or the news. Octolens is one API for every mention across the internet. AI-filtered JSON via API, webhooks & MCP. Pipe it into Slack, your CRM, your warehouse, or your agents.

Name: Sunrise
Tagline: A real planner for Google Tasks
Description: Google Tasks is fine for jotting things down. It’s terrible for planning your day. No Today view. No overdue section. No way to see what’s due this week at a glance. Just flat lists. Sunrise is a planner built on top of Google Tasks. See today’s tasks, catch what’s overdue, scroll through what’s coming up, and organize work on a kanban board — all synced with your existing Google Tasks lists. Your data stays in Google.

Name: Edgee Claude Code Compressor V2
Tagline: Fewer tokens, same context, 50% cost reduction
Description: Compression V2 cuts coding-agent token bills with three techniques across two layers: sharper tool result trimming, new task-aware tool surface reduction, and output brevity. Drop-in for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and Cursor. Semantically lossless.

Name: Stanley Studio
Tagline: The AI video editor you hire that edits like a human
Description: Stanley is built for anyone who films great videos and then lets them die in their camera roll. Send Stanley raw footage and get back a finished, captioned video. No timelines, no manually tweaking captions, no spending hours hunting for the perfect song. Just tell Stanley what you want and it edits end-to-end: talking heads, vlogs, podcast cuts, UGC, whatever your niche needs. And it's free. Upload footage, get a video.

Name: Astryx
Tagline: A customizable, agent-ready open-source design system
Topics: Design Tools, User Experience, GitHub, Design
Description: Astryx is Meta’s open-source design system built on React and StyleX. It includes accessible components, brand-level themes, templates, dark mode, CLI/MCP docs, and customization paths for both developers and AI agents.

Name: Nixmac
Tagline: Nix-darwin that speaks plain English
Topics: Open Source, Developer Tools, Artificial Intelligence, GitHub
Description: nixmac turns your Mac into a reproducible, version-controlled system. Describe what you want in plain English — it writes the Nix, builds it, and applies it safely.

Name: CodeMote
Tagline: Claude Code, Codex, any CLI agent. Driven from your iPhone
Description: CodeMote pairs your iPhone to your machine or VPS and gives you the real sessions. Live terminal on your lock screen, push when your agent needs approval, full diffs, complete git flow. Direct encrypted connection. Your code never touches our servers.

Name: Lumina
Tagline: Stop Feeling Like a Fraud. Start Owning Your Success.
Description: A data-driven toolkit for professionals to identify, manage, and dismantle imposter syndrome. Transform fraudulence into fluency.

Name: Cadence
Tagline: Record Once, Send Confidently
Description: Cadence is the only screen recorder that effortlessly perfects your video the moment you hit stop. The AI instantly transforms accents, applies clear voice dubbing, removes background noise, and automatically builds transcripts and screenshots for you.

Name: AirKaren
Tagline: AI that fights customer service for you
Description: AirKaren is the AI that fights customer service for you, completely for free. Tell Karen what went wrong with your flight, and she cites the regulation, files your claim, and chases down what you're owed. Karen will call customer support hotlines, send emails, and fill out forms so you never have to again. We're starting with airlines and expanding to other industries in the coming weeks.

Name: Mozaik
Tagline: TypeScript runtime for self-organizing AI agents
Description: Mozaik enables autonomous agent teams to work concurrently, react to events, communicate intelligently, and decide how collaboration should unfold during execution.

Name: Pebbles Ai
Tagline: The Neurosymbolic Go-To-Market Operating System
Description: Pebbles Ai brings strategy, marketing, sales, lead generation, outreach, and collaboration into one AI-native Go-To-Market Operating System. The GTMOS runs on neurosymbolic AI and your company knowledge base, replacing 10+ disconnected tools so teams can move faster and close deals from one workspace.

Name: HirePilot
Tagline: AI job search assistant that saves time & lands interviews
Description: HirePilot is your AI-powered job search copilot. Browse job listings, auto-fill applications in seconds on LinkedIn, Indeed, and Workday, track every role in one clean pipeline, and reach hiring managers directly with personalized outreach, so you spend less time applying and more time interviewing.

Name: Gradialy by Fold Now Studio
Tagline: Visual CSS gradient generator for designers
Topics: Design Tools, Developer Tools, Web Design
Description: Gradialy is a visual CSS gradient generator for designers, developers and web creators. Create linear, radial and animated gradients, add subtle grain, copy ready CSS code, save your favorite combinations and export gradients as PNG, SVG or HTML. Built by Fold Now Studio as a small, design-first tool for creating beautiful backgrounds and UI gradients faster.

Name: AppOrbit
Tagline: See what mobile apps actually hit the bank with verified MRR
Description: AppOrbit is a leaderboard and marketplace for mobile apps with verified MRR. List a project, show off real growth, and get contacted directly by buyers looking to acquire. Built with some unique space features: 🌍 Revenue Globe: A 3D Earth globe to track the biggest astronauts, their apps, and see which countries are crushing the revenue game. 🛸 UFO Launch: Hide your app from other astronauts. 👽 Alien Mode: Go anonymous and let the metrics do the talking.

Name: Seviq AI
Tagline: Fix your AI visibility yourself and skip pricey agency fees
Description: The GEO problem is real, but agencies charge prices only big companies can afford. 9 out of 10 products are invisible to AI search, so we built Seviq as an affordable one-time purchase. We don't just tell you if you're visible, you already know you're not. We show you exactly how you can start appearing, through a live audit with fixes downloadable as files and a three-phase roadmap. Your report is a hosted interactive webpage you can share, not a PDF. No login or storage required.

Name: AI Pages by Heartbeat
Tagline: AI landing pages to sell your community–right where it lives
Description: Heartbeat runs your entire community business: courses, events, memberships, & payments. Now you can sell faster with beautifully branded landing pages. Describe your ideal sales page and our AI generates it, customized for your community. Perfect every pixel, push edits, and publish in minutes.

Name: Quickfront
Tagline: Build a storefront and run your whole business from it
Description: Quickfront is a business automation platform for Nigerian merchants: AI storefronts, payments, orders and inventory in one place.
